What we know about the shooting at Trump's dinner with White House journalists
items.summary: The annual White House Correspondents' dinner was disrupted by gunfire on Saturday evening, causing an emergency evacuation of US President Donald Trump and his administration officials while attendees sheltered under tables. The gunman, who has been detained, reportedly told officials he wanted to shoot members of the Trump administration.

items.title: Several killed in Colombia highway bomb attack ahead of presidential election
items.summary: At least 14 people were killed and 38 injured in a highway bomb attack in southwest Colombia that the authorities blamed on the dissidents of the former FARC guerrilla army. The attack came amid a spate of violence across the country ahead of next month's presidential election.

items.title: Middle East war live: Iran's FM to return to Pakistan for talks as US envoys cancel visit
items.summary: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi is expected to return to Pakistan on Sunday for more peace negotiations, state media reported, having just left Islamabad the previous day. US envoys did not arrive in Islamabad as expected on Saturday after Iran said it would not participate in direct negotiations with the US. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

items.title: 'I’m the only person who can do it': Why 102-year-old Dachau survivor Jean Lafaurie tells his story
items.summary: A member of the French Resistance who was deported to Dachau concentration camp, 102-year-old Jean Lafaurie continues to share his story with generations of students – and warn them about the hard right’s return in Europe. Ahead of France’s National Day of Remembrance for Victims and Heroes of the Deportation, Lafaurie told FRANCE 24 about the solidarity that helped him and other prisoners survive the hell of Dachau.

items.title: Tibetans-in-exile vote for new government as future without Dalai Lama looms
items.summary: Tibetans living outside Chinese control vote on Sunday for a government-in-exile in a ballot seen as increasingly significant as they prepare for an eventual future without their revered spiritual leader, the Dalai Lama. The India-based Central Tibetan Administration remains central to the exile community.

items.title: Trump rushed off stage after shots fired at White House correspondents’ dinner
items.summary: Shots were fired near a Washington hotel hosting the White House Correspondents’ Dinner on Saturday as US President Donald Trump attended the event, prompting security agents to rush him off stage. Guests ducked under tables as chaos erupted. Trump later said the suspected gunman had been apprehended.

items.summary: Les combats ont repris dimanche dans la ville de Kidal, dans le nord du Mali, entre la rébellion touareg appuyée par les jihadistes d'Al-Qaïda contre l'armée malienne soutenue par des mercenaires russes, a appris l'AFP auprès de la rébellion touareg et d'un élu local.

translation.title: Mali: Resumed fighting in Kidal between the army and Tuareg rebels allied to jihadists
translation.summary: The fighting resumed on Sunday in the city of Kidal, in northern Mali, between the Tuareg rebellion supported by al-Qaeda jihadists against the Malian army supported by Russian mercenaries, learned the AFP from the Tuareg rebellion and a local elected official.

items.title: Trump évacué du gala de la presse après des tirs : ce que l'on sait
items.summary: Un assaillant a tenté de forcer l'entrée du gala de la presse à la Maison Blanche, auquel assistait le président américain samedi soir. Donald Trump et les autres participants ont été évacués après les coups de feu, et le suspect a été arrêté. L'enquête, confiée au FBI, doit permettre d'en savoir plus sur l'identité du tireur présumé et le dispositif de sécurité de la réception.

translation.title: Trump evacuated from the press gala after shooting: what we know
translation.summary: An assailant attempted to force the entrance of the press gala to the White House, attended by the American president on Saturday night. Donald Trump and the other participants were evacuated after the shooting, and the suspect was arrested. The investigation, entrusted to the FBI, should provide more information on the identity of the alleged shooter and the security features of the reception.

items.title: Tibet : la diaspora vote pour élire son Parlement et s'interroge sur l'avenir de la communauté
items.summary: Quelque 91 000 électeurs tibétains en exil sont appelés aux urnes, dimanche, pour élire leur gouvernement. Les votes se déroulent dans 27 pays et la Chine, qui condamne l'élection, n'en fait pas partie. Les élections interviennent en plein incertitude sur l'avenir de la communauté tibétaine, dont le chef spirituel, le dalaï-lama, a 90 ans.

translation.title: Tibet: Diaspora votes to elect its Parliament and wonders about the future of the community
translation.summary: Some 91,000 Tibetan voters in exile are called to vote on Sunday to elect their government. Voting takes place in 27 countries and China, which condemns the election, is not one of them. Elections take place in full uncertainty about the future of the Tibetan community, whose spiritual leader, the Dalai Lama, is 90 years old.

items.title: Jean Lafaurie, 102 ans : survivre aux camps et résister encore
items.summary: À 102 ans, Jean Lafaurie, ancien maquisard déporté à Dachau, continue inlassablement de témoigner, notamment auprès des plus jeunes. Lui, qui a survécu à l'enfer des camps grâce à la solidarité entre les prisonniers, tient à transmettre un message d'alerte alors que les conflits font rage dans le monde. France 24 l'a rencontré et livre son récit à l'occasion de la journée nationale en mémoire des victimes et des héros de la déportation.

translation.title: Jean Lafaurie, 102 years old: survive the camps and resist again
translation.summary: At the age of 102, Jean Lafaurie, a former maquisard deported to Dachau, continues tirelessly to testify, especially to the youngest. He, who survived the hell of the camps thanks to the solidarity between the prisoners, wants to convey an alert message as conflicts rage in the world. France 24 met him and gave his story on the occasion of the national day in memory of the victims and heroes of the deportation.

items.title: En direct : un émissaire iranien attendu au Pakistan malgré l'annulation du départ des Américains
items.summary: Le chef de la diplomatie iranienne est de nouveau attendu dimanche à Islamabad malgré l'annulation, la veille par les États-Unis, de la venue des émissaires américains Steve Witkoff et Jared Kushner. Le président américain a malgré tout laissé la porte ouverte à de nouvelles discussions et assuré avoir déjà reçu des propositions améliorées de Téhéran. Suivez notre direct.

translation.title: Live: Iranian emissary expected in Pakistan despite US departure cancelled
translation.summary: The head of Iranian diplomacy is again expected on Sunday in Islamabad despite the cancellation, the previous day by the United States, of the arrival of American envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner. Nevertheless, the US President left the door open for further discussions and assured him that he had already received improved proposals from Tehran. Follow our direct.

items.title: Donald Trump évacué après des tirs au dîner des correspondants de la Maison Blanche
items.summary: Un tireur a tenté samedi soir de forcer l'entrée du dîner des correspondants de la Maison Blanche, auquel participait Donald Trump pour la première fois. Le président américain, ainsi que de nombreux autres officiels, ont été évacués, et un membre des forces de l'ordre a été touché par des tirs. Le suspect, décrit comme un "loup solitaire", a été arrêté et comparaîtra lundi devant la justice.

translation.title: Donald Trump evacuated after shooting at White House correspondents dinner
translation.summary: A shooter tried Saturday night to force the entrance to the White House correspondents' dinner, in which Donald Trump was participating for the first time. The US President, along with many other officials, were evacuated, and a member of the law enforcement force was hit by fire. The suspect, described as a solitaire loup, was arrested and will appear before the courts on Monday.

items.title: Au moins 14 personnes tuées dans un attentat en Colombie, en proie à une vague de violences
items.summary: Le département du Cauca, dans le sud-ouest de la Colombie, a été visé samedi par un attentat à la bombe, à un peu plus d'un mois des élections présidentielles. Au moins 14 personnes ont été tuées et une quarantaine ont été blessées. Les autorités ont accusé la principale dissidence des Forces armées révolutionnaires de Colombie (Farc).

translation.title: At least 14 people killed in an attack in Colombia in a wave of violence
translation.summary: The Cauca department in southwestern Colombia was targeted by a bomb attack on Saturday, just over a month before the presidential elections. At least 14 people were killed and about 40 injured. The authorities accused the main dissent of the Revolutionary Armed Forces of Colombia (Far).

items.title: Le nageur de l'extrême Stève Stievernart boucle "la triple couronne du bout du monde"
items.summary: Le nageur de l'extrême Stève Stievenart est devenu le premier homme à compléter "la triple couronne du bout du monde" en reliant l'Uruguay à l'Argentine. Le Français, surnommé "le Phoque", a mis 17 h 59 min 33 sec à la nage pour traverser le Rio de la Plata en Argentine sur 43 kilomètres. Il valide ainsi la troisième étape de la "triple couronne du bout du monde", après ses traversées du détroit de Beagle (entre l'Argentine et le Chili) et du détroit de Magellan au Chili.

translation.title: The swimmer of the extreme Stève Stievernart loop "the triple crown of the end of the world"
translation.summary: The swimmer of the extreme Stève Stievenart became the first man to complete "the triple crown at the end of the world" by connecting Uruguay with Argentina. The Frenchman, nicknamed "the Seal", took 1759:33 seconds to swim across the Rio de la Plata in Argentina for 43 kilometres. It thus validates the third stage of the "triple crown of the end of the world", after its crossing of the Strait of Beagle (between Argentina and Chile) and the Strait of Magellan in Chile.

items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.

items.summary: A fire at a marine terminal in Tuapse entered its fourth day before firefighters gained the upper hand. By the morning of April 24, the Krasnodar Krai emergency operations center reported that crews had contained the blaze and extinguished the open burning. Work to fully put out the fire was continuing, the center said, with 276 personnel and 77 pieces of equipment on scene.

items.title: Russian e-book platforms attach drug-harm labels to works by Pushkin, Gogol, and Bulgakov
items.summary: Russian e-book and audiobook platforms have started attaching drug-harm warning labels to works by literary classics including Alexander Pushkin, Nikolai Gogol, and Mikhail Bulgakov, the independent Russian news outlet Verstka reported.

items.title: Nearly 1 in 4 Russians say they distrust Putin, highest share since start of full-scale war
items.summary: Trust in Vladimir Putin has fallen to 71 percent and his approval rating to 65.6 percent, according to new data from the Russian Public Opinion Research Center (VTsIOM). Some 24.1 percent of respondents said they do not trust Putin, and 23.3 percent do not approve of his performance as president.

items.title: Firefighters extinguish blaze at Russian oil terminal after drone strikes sparked days-long fire

items.title: FSB says it foiled car bombing plot targeting leadership of Russia’s internet regulator

items.title: Russian drone attack on Odesa kills 2, injures 14; residential buildings and cargo ship damaged
items.summary: A Russian drone attack on Odesa in the early hours of April 24 killed two people and injured 14 others, Oleh Kiper, the head of the Odesa regional administration, said.

items.title: Russia’s FSB tortured 9 Kherson residents for months, fabricated terrorism case against them; 1 died in custody
items.summary: The defendants in the “Kherson Nine” case were detained in the summer of 2022, when Kherson was still under Russian occupation. They were charged with plotting assassinations of collaborationist officials in the city. In January 2026, a Russian court sentenced them to between 14 and 20 years in prison.

items.title: Gujarat horror: Dietician killed by husband in Surat, body kept in wooden box
items.summary: A dietician was allegedly murdered by her husband in Surat, Gujarat, with her body discovered stuffed inside a wooden box at his old residence. The accused husband had filed a missing person report for his wife before disappearing himself. Police are actively searching for the suspect and investigating the motive.

items.title: '28 days of hell': Meta employees brace for layoffs as 8,000 jobs get cut on May 20
items.summary: Meta is cutting roughly 8,000 employees—10% of its workforce—on May 20, with another 6,000 open roles being closed. The announcement, made via an internal memo from chief people officer Janelle Gale, has sent workers into a monthlong limbo. Employees are flooding internal forums and the anonymous app Blind with anxiety, dark humor, and resignation. The layoffs are tied to Meta's aggressive AI spending, projected at up to $135 billion this year.

items.title: 'If you're not close enough, your photo is not good enough': Remembering Raghu Rai
items.summary: Legendary photographer Raghu Rai, who shaped India's visual memory for over five decades, passed away on Sunday. His iconic images, from the Bhopal Gas tragedy to portraits of national figures, gave permanence to history. Rai believed visual history was more important than fine art, emphasizing closeness to truth in his immersive photographic practice.

items.title: 'Shots will be fired': Karoline Leavitt’s pre-dinner comments go viral after White House shooting
